module.name: timer
module.description: Countdown timer with start / pause / reset. Self-contained inline element (no closing tag). Movable on the preview in Edit layout; resize is horizontal-only. Interactive: clicking it does not advance the slide. Auto-starts when presenting if autostart:true.
module.aiSpec:
Use to drop a live countdown timer on a slide (e.g. for exercises, breaks, timed Q&A). Inline module with NO body and no closing tag — just the directive. Interactive: it has start/pause/reset controls and clicking it never advances the slide.
Parameters: minutes — starting minutes (default 5, integer >= 0). seconds — additional starting seconds (default 0, 0..59). If both are 0 it falls back to 5 minutes. autostart — begin counting automatically when presenting (default false). size — readout size: sm | md (default) | lg | xl. shape — background box: rounded (default) | pill | square | none. bg — background colour (default rgba(0,0,0,0.06)). border — border colour (default none). color — text colour (default inherits). label — short caption printed before the time, e.g. "Break:" (default "" = none). controls — show the start/pause/reset buttons (default true; false = display-only). align — alignment when placed in Edit layout: left | center (default) | right.
Example: <!-- @timer minutes: 5, size: lg, label: Break, autostart: true -->

param.name: seconds
param.label: Seconds
param.desc: Extra starting seconds added to the minutes (0-59).

param.name: autostart
param.label: Auto-start when presenting
param.desc: Begin counting down automatically when the slideshow opens this page.

param.name: shape
param.label: Background shape
param.desc: Corner style of the background box (none = no box).

param.name: bg
param.label: Background color
param.desc: Background colour of the timer box.

param.name: border
param.label: Border color
param.desc: Border colour of the timer box (blank = no border).

param.name: color
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Colour of the digits (blank = inherit theme text colour).

param.name: label
param.label: Caption
param.desc: Short caption printed before the time, e.g. Break: (blank = none).

param.name: controls
param.label: Show controls
param.desc: Show the start/pause and reset buttons (false = display-only).

param.name: align
param.label: Align (Edit layout)
param.desc: Alignment inside the box when placed in Edit layout.

snippet.label: Timer (5 min)
snippet.description: Countdown timer with start/pause/reset. Clicks don't advance the slide.

snippet.label: Timer (auto-start on present)
snippet.description: Starts automatically when the slideshow opens this page.

snippet.label: Timer (large)
snippet.description: Bigger timer. size: sm | md | lg | xl.
